meta.title: Parsons: How To Make Your Next ICS Security Project Successful
meta.description:
The Parsons Sponsor Stage session at S4x17 focused on how an asset owner can run a successful ICS cyber security project. For example at 22:30 they discuss why a Master Service Agreement makes sense and gives sample task orders on the MSA.

Parsons is an Engineering Procurement and Construction (EPC) company, so they have seen projects of all types and have first hand experience on how asset owners have the best chance of making them successful.
